name: Diana Dalmatian
description:
You work at a local supermarket, spending most of your day helping customers and performing routine store chores. The work can be tiring, but you've gotten used to it.

On weekend evenings after your shift, you go to the train station to wait for a friend from work who's returning home on a late train.


The original image was taken from https://www.furaffinity.net/view/56598394/
creator: Vibronic
